description: Use this API to return plant total power output. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, cmpval = gendat(ibus)

error_codes.description: Bus not found; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Bus type code is not 2 or 3; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ returned.
No machines at bus; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
No online machines; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ of 0.0 or ‘CMPVAL’ of (0.0,0.0) returned.
